ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "pid" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title or description of the product */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the product was listed */,
  "originalprice" REAL /* Original price of the product */,
  "finalprice" REAL /* Final price after any discounts */,
  "shippingprice" REAL /* Shipping price for the product */,
  "instock" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is in stock */,
  "ishot" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is a hot item */,
  "isshipbynewegg" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is shipped by Newegg */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category ID of the product */,
  "sub_category_id" INTEGER /* Sub-category ID of the product */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the product */,
  "specifications" TEXT /* Detailed specifications of the product (in JSON format) */,
  "image_urls" TEXT /* URLs of product images (in JSON array format) */,
  "warranty_period" TEXT /* Warranty period of the product */,
  "return_policy" TEXT /* Return policy details */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Supplier ID of the product */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date and time of the product information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_sub_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("sub_category_id") REFERENCES sub_categories ("sub_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "pid" TEXT /* Reference to the product being reviewed */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "totalreviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews received for the product */,
  "promotion" TEXT /* Any promotions associated with the product */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the reviewer */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date and time the review was written */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes the review has received */,
  "unhelpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of unhelpful votes the review has received */,
  "verified_purchase" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review is from a verified purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_pid FOREIGN KEY ("pid") REFERENCES products ("pid")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "pid" TEXT /* Reference to the product associated with the promotion */,
  "rebate" REAL /* Rebate amount offered for the promotion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "promotion_type" TEXT /* Type of promotion (e.g., percentage off, fixed amount off) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the promotion */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the promotion (active, upcoming, expired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_pid FOREIGN KEY ("pid") REFERENCES products ("pid")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sub_categories" (
  "sub_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sub-category */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  "sub_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the sub-category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sub-category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sub_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sub_categories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)
